mapper.insert: insert into document_chunks ( document_id, group_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, chunk_summary, char_start, char_end, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{documentId}, #{groupId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkText}, #{chunkSummary}, #{charStart}, #{charEnd}, cast(#{metadataJson} as jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

insert into document_chunks ( document_id, group_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, chunk_summary, char_start, char_end, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values
( #{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.groupId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.chunkText}, #{chunk.chunkSummary}, #{chunk.charStart}, #{chunk.charEnd}, cast(#{chunk.metadataJson} as jsonb), #{chunk.createdAt}, #{chunk.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, document_id as documentId, group_id as groupId, chunk_index as chunkIndex, chunk_text as chunkText, chunk_summary as chunkSummary, char_start as charStart, char_end as charEnd, metadata_json::text as metadataJson, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from document_chunks where document_id = #{documentId} order by chunk_index asc, id asc

select chunks.id as id, chunks.document_id as documentId, chunks.group_id as groupId, chunks.chunk_index as chunkIndex, chunks.chunk_text as chunkText, chunks.chunk_summary as chunkSummary, chunks.char_start as charStart, chunks.char_end as charEnd, chunks.metadata_json::text as metadataJson, chunks.created_at as createdAt, chunks.updated_at as updatedAt from document_chunks chunks join documents documents on documents.id = chunks.document_id and documents.group_id = chunks.group_id where chunks.group_id = #{groupId} and chunks.document_id = #{documentId} and documents.status = 'READY' and documents.deleted = false order by chunks.chunk_index asc, chunks.id asc

select chunks.id as chunkId, chunks.document_id as documentId, chunks.chunk_index as chunkIndex, chunks.chunk_text as chunkText, documents.file_name as fileName from document_chunks chunks join documents documents on documents.id = chunks.document_id and documents.group_id = chunks.group_id where chunks.group_id = #{groupId} and documents.status = 'READY' and documents.deleted = false and chunks.id in
#{chunkId}

select chunks.group_id as groupId, chunks.id as chunkId, chunks.document_id as documentId, chunks.chunk_index as chunkIndex, chunks.chunk_text as chunkText, documents.file_name as fileName from document_chunks chunks join documents documents on documents.id = chunks.document_id and documents.group_id = chunks.group_id where chunks.group_id = #{groupId} and documents.status = 'READY' and documents.deleted = false and chunks.id in
#{chunkId}
